title: neckeria claviculata
intro: Neckeria claviculata, also known as Neckera claviculata, is a species of moss in the family Neckeraceae. This epiphytic, perennial plant is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Neckeria claviculata has been reported to possess antiviral, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its various health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional remedies to support respiratory health and immune system function.
